evals.prompt: Run a full GEM competency analysis on the latest candidate in my hiring context.
evals.expected_output: Finds context and candidate, checks for existing analyses, confirms 10 credit cost for gem_full, runs analysis, polls until complete, presents competency scores.

assertions.name: finds_context
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_contexts to find hiring context

assertions.name: finds_candidate
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_candidates to find the candidate

assertions.name: checks_existing
assertions.description: Calls atlas_list_analyses to check for existing analyses
